hooks.command: Write-Host '=== js-analysis hook system initialized ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] JavaScript bundle analysis agent active. Model: claude-sonnet-4-6. Input: live URLs from recon-ranker output ranked by priority.' -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Mission: extract hidden API endpoints, hardcoded secrets, internal paths, feature flags, cloud keys, OAuth credentials, config leaks from JS bundles. Output: js_findings/{bundle_hash}.json.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Methods: (1) Browser DevTools network capture, (2) CLI: katana/ffuf/waybackurls for JS discovery, (3) Static: LinkFinder, JSParser, SecretFinder, (4) Dynamic: Puppeteer/Playwright runtime extraction.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Secret patterns detected: AWS keys (AKIA), GCP service account keys, Azure storage keys, Slack tokens (xox[baprs]-), GitHub tokens (ghp_, gho_, github_pat_), Stripe keys (sk_live_, pk_live_), Firebase config objects, Twilio (SK), SendGrid, Mandrill, Mailgun, Algolia, Contentful, Postman, Mapbox, Algolia, PagerDuty, New Relic.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Workflow: discovery -> download -> deobfuscate if needed -> static regex scan -> DOM extraction -> API endpoint extraction -> secret extraction -> report.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Framework detection: React (React.createElement, __SECRET_INTERNALS_DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED), Vue (Vue.createApp, __VUE_OPTIONS_API__), Angular (ng.core, ngZone, __Zone_disable_JS), Svelte (SvelteComponent, __svelte_meta).' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Build tool detection: webpack (webpackChunk, webpackJsonp, __webpack_require__, webpack_public_path__), Rollup (rollup, __rollup_static__, rollup_static_asset), Vite (import.meta.hot, __VITE_DEVTOOLS__, vite), Parcel (parcelRequire, PARCEL_SUCCESS, __PARCEL_IMPORT__).' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Source map extraction: check for //# sourceURL= comments, X-SourceMap header, .map file extension in URLs. Parse with source-map-visualization, source-map-explorer, or manual parser. Extract original file list and source code.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] CSP analysis: check Content-Security-Policy headers and meta tags. Look for unsafe-inline, unsafe-eval, nonce/weak nonce patterns. document-src, script-src, connect-src, frame-src for bypass opportunities.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] CORS analysis: check Access-Control-Allow-Origin for null origin, wildcard, reflected origin. Check Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true combined with cheap origin. Check exposed headers for sensitive data leakage.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] XHR intercept patterns: XMLHttpRequest override, fetch override, ServiceWorker registration, PostMessage listeners, WebSocket connections. Document message formats and authentication state.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Client-side routing analysis: React Router, Vue Router, Angular Router, Sapper/SvelteKit routing. Extract routes and check for authenticated route guards, parameterized paths, and hidden routes.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Headers and cookies analysis: check for HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite, Domain, Path cookie attributes. Look for session tokens, CSRF tokens, custom auth headers. Document cookie scope and leakage risks.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Runtime config exposure: check window.__INITIAL_STATE__, window.__CONFIG__, window.__APP_CONFIG__, window.__PLATFORM__, __NEXT_DATA__, __NUXT__, __APOLLO_STATE__, window.__REDUX_STATE__. Extract configs and compare against production.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Memory hygiene: Never store raw secrets in any output file. Use SHA-256 hash for identification. Keep findings redacted: show first 8 chars + ***. Clear temp files after validation.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Health check: verify output directories exist (js_findings/, js_bundles/, findings/js_static/, endpoints/). Create if missing using New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Target verification: confirm scope includes all JS host domains from recon-ranker. Out-of-scope domains = EXCLUDE from all analysis. scope.json is source of truth.' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] CRITICAL: Never publish raw secrets/tokens in reports. Redact: show first 8 characters + ***. Report pattern, risk, and affected service only.' -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Report potential but unverified secrets as informational. Ask program if rotation is required before submitting.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Source maps (.map files) are gold mines. Always check for .map files alongside .js bundles.' -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Large bundles (>1MB) may need splitting. Use source maps or manual chunk analysis for manageable review.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Warning: Obfuscated JS bundles (eval, base64, array-based obfuscation) require deobfuscation before effective static analysis. Use unwebpack-sourcemap, de4js, or manual extraction.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Remember: JS bundle analysis complements recon. Use both active and passive recon results to prioritize targets.' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '[JS PRE] Verifying target URLs are in-scope before JS bundle download...' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow

if ($lastCommand -match 'katana|ffuf|gobuster|feroxbuster|waybackurls|urlfinder|gospider') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS discovery/crawler tool detected. Set depth limit max 3. Output goes to js_urls.txt.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'curl.*\.js|wget.*\.js|curl.*\.mjs|wget\.js|wget.*bundle') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS bundle download detected. Verify URL is in-scope. Save to output/js_bundles/ with SHA-256 hash as filename.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'LinkFinder|JSParser|SecretFinder|truffleHog|jsluice|jshole') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Static analysis tool detected. Pipe scope-limited bundles only. Tool output goes to findings/js_static/. Tool-specific regexes may miss non-English strings.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'puppeteer|playwright|selenium|chromedriver|geckodriver') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Browser automation tool detected. Set headless mode. Capture network requests and console output. Browser fingerprint detectable by targets.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'sourcemap|\.map|map\.js') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Source map file detected. Source maps reveal original source. Treat as high-value find. extracted source saved to output/js_sourcemap/' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'grep|rg|awk|sed|regex|findstr') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Text search on JS files. Limit to known secret patterns. Do NOT dump full files to output. Use targeted regex only.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'js-beautify|prettier|unminify|deobfuscate|jsnice|unpacker') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS beautification/deobfuscation detected. Large deobfuscated output -> summarize, do not store raw. Memory limit: 2GB for deobfuscation process.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'webpack|parcel|rollup|vite|esbuild|swc') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Bundler tool detected. Check for source maps and exposed build configuration. webpack stats may expose internal paths and module graph.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'react|vue|angular|svelte|next|nuxt|gatsby|remix|svelteKit|astro') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Framework-specific search/analysis. React: check __SECRET_INTERNALS_ and fiber internals. Vue: __VUE_OPTIONS_API__. Angular: ngZone internals. Next/Nuxt: __NEXT_DATA__/__NUXT__.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'xhr|XMLHttpRequest|ajax|cors|preflight') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] XHR/CORS analysis detected. Review preflight requests for allowed origins and headers. Document custom headers and auth tokens sent.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'burp|burpsuite|proxy|repeater|intruder') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Burp Suite usage detected. Imported proxy history may contain XHR calls. Export endpoints for manual testing. Enable logging.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'playwright|puppeteer|selenium|chromedriver|geckodriver') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Browser automation tool set. Configure headless mode. Set timeout 60s. Capture network requests and console output for JS analysis.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'cdn|cloudfront|fastly|akamai|jsdelivr|unpkg|esm|esm.sh|skypack|jspm') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] CDN/external script source detected. Check if in-scope and if versioned URLs leak information. CDN cross-origin may expand scope.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'content-security-policy|csp|nonce|hash|strict-dynamic|unsafe-eval|unsafe-inline') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] CSP analysis detected. Look for unsafe directives and potential bypass vectors. Document current CSP for report context.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'cors|access-control|origin|credentials|exposed-headers|allow-credentials') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] CORS configuration detected. Check for wildcard origins, reflected origins, or null origin allowance. Wildcard + credentials = HIGH severity if confirmed.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'npm|yarn|pnpm|package\.json|node_modules|bower') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Package manager tool detected. Check for dependency confusion, internal package name leakage, outdated dependency versions in package.json.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'jwt|token|decode|verify|sign|base64|x5c|x5t|x5u|alg|RS256|HS256|ES256') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JWT library or tool detected. Analyze token structure, signing algorithms, and key handling. Check for alg:none, weak secret, kid injection.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }
Write-Host '[JS PRE] WebSearch detected for JS research. Prioritize official framework docs, security advisories, and known CVEs affecting detected library versions.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow

if ($lastCommand -match '\.js$|\.mjs$|\.jsx$|\.ts$|\.tsx$') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS file read detected. Scanning for secrets, endpoints, and config in current file. Output to findings/js_static/.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }
Write-Host '[JS POST] Reviewing JS analysis output for secrets, endpoints, and sensitive configuration.' -ForegroundColor DarkCyan

if ($lastOutput -match 'AKIA|ASIA|AIza|AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE|xox[baprs]-|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36}|sk_live_|pk_live_|firebase|twilio|sendgrid|mandrill|mailgun|mapbox|contentful|postman|pagerduty|newrelic') { Write-Host '[SECRET] Hardcoded API key/secret found in JS bundle. Document service, key type, scope, and risk. REDACT full value in report.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match '/api/v[0-9]+|/graphql|/rest|/internal|/admin|/private|/secure|/health|/metrics|/debug|/config|endpoint|baseURL|apiUrl|API_URL|BASE_URL') { Write-Host '[ENDPOINT] API endpoint or internal URL found in JS. Document base URL pattern, auth headers expected, and endpoint purpose.' -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($lastOutput -match 'localhost|127\.0\.0\.1|10\.|172\.16\.|192\.168|internal|intranet|staging|dev\.|test\.') { Write-Host '[CONFIG] Internal/dev URL patterns found in bundle. Check if these can be abused (SSRF, internal access).' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'feature.?flag|isEnabled|rollout|experiment|AB.?test|dark.?launch|kill.?switch|ENV_|NODE_ENV|process\.env|__CONFIG__|window\.__') { Write-Host '[CONFIG] Feature flags or runtime config found. Document flags and whether they expose hidden/unfinished features.' -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($lastOutput -match 'aws_access_key_id|aws_secret_access_key|aws_session_token|gcloud|azure|azure_storage|service_account|private_key|-----BEGIN') { Write-Host '[SECRET] Cloud provider credentials found. HIGH severity. Verify if these are production keys. Report to program immediately.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'jwt|jsonwebtoken|decode|sign|verify|alg|kid|exp|nbf|access_token|refresh_token|id_token|session_token') { Write-Host '[CONFIG] JWT/auth token handling found in JS. Check for alg:none, weak signing, token storage (localStorage vs httpOnly cookie).' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'password|passwd|pwd|secret|private|apiKey|api_key|app_key|consumer_key|consumer_secret') { Write-Host '[SECRET] Password/secret variables found. Check if hardcoded vs env-injected. Hardcoded = high severity.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'oauth|oauth2|openid|auth0|firebase.auth|identity|sso|saml|okta|auth0|keycloak|ping|cognito|azure.ad') { Write-Host '[AUTH] OAuth/SAML/SSO configuration found. Check for redirect_uri issues, scope misconfig, client secret exposure.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 's3://gs://azure|blob.core|storage.googleapis|digitalocean|backblaze|cloudflare.r2') { Write-Host '[STORAGE] Cloud storage URLs/credentials found. Verify bucket ACLs. Check for path traversal or wildcard access patterns.' -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($lastOutput -match 'stripe\.|braintree\.|square\.|paypal\.|adyen\.|checkout|payment_intent|customer_id|payment_method') { Write-Host '[PAYMENT] Payment SDK/credentials found. HIGH reward target. Check for client-side exposure of payment logic or keys.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'database|mongo|postgres|mysql|redis|elastic|kafka|connection_string|dsn|DATABASE_URL|MONGO_URL|REDIS_URL') { Write-Host '[SECRET] Database connection strings or credentials found. CRITICAL if production. Report immediately to program.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'debug|verbose|log_level|DEBUG|VERBOSE|development|staging|sandbox|test_mode|mock') { Write-Host '[CONFIG] Debug/development mode flags found. If these remain in production, they may leak sensitive information via API responses.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'eval\(|new Function|setTimeout.*string|setInterval.*string|document\.write|innerHTML|outerHTML|\.html\(|dangerouslySetInnerHTML') { Write-Host '[XSS] DOM XSS sink found. Trace source (location.hash, postMessage, localStorage). Document payload construction.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'axios\.|fetch\(|XMLHttpRequest|\$http|\.get\(|\.post\(|\.put\(|\.delete\(|ajax') { Write-Host '[ENDPOINT] HTTP client library calls found. Extract all API URLs and methods. Check for authorization on each.' -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($lastOutput -match 'CryptoJS|encrypt|decrypt|cipher|aes|rsa|sign|verify|md5|sha1|bcrypt|pbkdf2') { Write-Host '[CRYPTO] Cryptographic implementation found. Check for weak algorithms, hardcoded keys, or insecure usage patterns.' -ForegroundColor Gray }
Write-Host '[JS CTX] LinkFinder usage: python linkfinder.py -i {bundle} -o {output}. Extract all domain/path combinations from JS strings.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] SecretFinder usage: python SecretFinder.py -i {bundle} -o {output} -r \'[regex]\'. Use built-in regexes for 30+ secret types.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] JSParser usage: python JSParser.py -d {domain} -u {url} -o {output}. Extracts URLs/endpoints from parsed JS AST.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] Browser automation: Playwright script -> navigate to page, capture all network requests, filter for XHR/fetch, extract request URLs and payloads.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Source map command: check URL/{bundle}.map, then parse with source-map-visualization or manual JSON parser to get original source files and original source.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] Deobfuscation pipeline: js-beautify first -> then targeted regex extraction. Full deobfuscation only if needed. Always preserve hash of original.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] Large file handling: split files >5MB using split command. Process chunks. Reassemble findings by endpoint URL deduplication.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Priority ranking of findings: (1) Active cloud credentials -> Critical, (2) Database credentials -> Critical, (3) Internal endpoints -> High, (4) API keys -> High, (5) Feature flags -> Medium, (6) Internal paths -> Medium.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
Write-Host '[JS CTX] Validation step: For each secret found, test if it works against known API (e.g., test AWS key against STS:GetCallerIdentity). Verify != assume active.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Extraction priority order: secret > internal endpoint > API endpoint > feature flag > config leak > code path. Each finding type has different impact. Secrets highest priority.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Output organization: organjs_analysis_findings by severity directory: critical/ (cloud keys, prod DB creds), high/ (internal endpoints, API keys), medium/ (feature flags, debug mode), low/ (internal paths, build info). Include finding_type subdir.' -ForegroundColor Gray

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Websocket analysis: detect WebSocket connections (new WebSocket, WebSocket URL, ws://, wss://). Capture full handshake, auth headers, message formats. WebSocket authz checks often weaker than REST.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Build artifact analysis: check for webpack stats exposure (stats.json), exposed build configs, development sources. Build artifacts often contain absolute paths, internal hostnames, env vars, API URLs for different environments.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Service Worker analysis: ServiceWorker registrations may cache sensitive data or intercept API calls indefinitely. Check scope, cache names, fetch handlers. sw.js = potential persistent XSS/TOU vector.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Third-party library vuln check: parse package.json and import maps to identify dependency tree. Cross-reference with Snyk, npm audit, OSV for known CVEs. Document affected packages with version ranges.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Prototype pollution check: scan for __proto__, constructor, prototype.[property] patterns. Object merging (Object.assign, $.extend, _merge, spread) with user input = prototype pollution vector in nested objects.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Client-side state analysis: Redux/Vuex/NgRx state inspection. Global state often contains full user object, permissions, session tokens. Document all keys in global state store.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Timing attack surface: check for password comparison, JWT verify, auth check via timing differences in JS. document.write to timing APIs that could leak information via side channels.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Third-party script trust: evaluate all externally-loaded scripts (cdn, analytics, ads, tag manager). Any XSS/CORS/Credential risk from third-party = report to program as supply chain risk.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Scope reminder: analyze only in-scope JS bundles. Redirect to third-party CDNs or analytics = note in report but do not deep-test unless explicitly in scope.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Browser automation ethics: honor robots.txt if program requires. Limit concurrent requests. Add realistic delays. Do not impact production with load testing via browser automation.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Credential validation protocol: for AWS keys found, test with aws sts get-caller-identity (read-only, no cost). For GitHub tokens, test with gh api /user (rate limited but safe). Do NOT assume keys are production without verification.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Evidence quality: screenshot for browser automation. Include browser console errors. Include HAR file from network tab. Raw response bodies. Auth headers redacted but shown as [REDACTED] in reports.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

if ($lastCommand -match 'js-beautify|prettier|unminify|deobfuscat|unwebpack|de4js|jsnice') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS beautification/deobfuscation detected. Large deobfuscated output = summarize, do not store raw. Memory: limit 2GB per process.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'webpack.*stats|stats\.json|build.*config|chunk|bundle.*analysis') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Webpack build artifact detected. stats.json exposes module graph, entry points, chunk paths. High value for attack surface analysis.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'linkfinder|linkfinder\.py|linkfinder.*-i|linkfinder.*-o|linkFinder') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] LinkFinder static analysis tool detected. Runs regex-based URL extraction. Output: {output_file}.txt. Process then report top 20 unique endpoints.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'secretfinder|secretfinder\.py|secretFinder|SecretFinder') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] SecretFinder static analysis tool detected. Extracts hardcoded secrets using regex. Use carefully: large output = filter to high-confidence only. Output: findings/js_static/secrets_{hash}.txt' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'js_parser|JSParser|JSParser\.py|jsparser') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JSParser AST analysis detected. Extracts URLs via static analysis of JS Abstract Syntax Tree. More accurate than regex for obfuscated JS. Output: findings/js_static/endpoints_{hash}.txt' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'jsluice|jshole|burp.*js|burpsuite.*js|jsminer') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS-specific security analysis tool detected. These tools often combine static + heuristics. Review output for false positives before adding to findings.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'chromium|chrome|edge|firefox.*headless|screenshot.*js|browser.*screenshot') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Browser screenshot/capture detected. Save screenshots to findings/evidence/screenshots/. Human review of screenshots often reveals hidden UI elements.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'new WebSocket|ws://|wss://|WebSocket\(|EventSource|SSE|server.sent.events') { Write-Host '[WS] WebSocket endpoint found. Check: (1) auth at connection time, (2) message format, (3) per-message authz, (4) broadcast audience. WebSocket authz often missing entirely. Flag for p1-warrior testing.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'service.?worker|navigator\.serviceWorker|ServiceWorkerRegistration|cache\.|workbox|sw\.js') { Write-Host '[SW] Service Worker detected. SW has persistent cache, intercepts fetch, runs independently. Potential for: (1) cache poisoning, (2) offline data exfil, (3) persistent XSS via postMessage. Test before hunter session.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'fetch\(|XMLHttpRequest|axios|\$http|\.post|\.put|\.delete|\.patch|ajax\(\)|ajax\.') { Write-Host '[API] HTTP client call found. Extract: URL pattern, HTTP method, request headers (especially auth), request body schema. Cross-reference with ranked target list for hunting.' -ForegroundColor Green }

if ($lastOutput -match 'prototype|__proto__|constructor\.prototype|\.prototype\[|Object\.assign|\$\.extend|_merge|lodash.*merge|deep.?merge|Object\.entries') { Write-Host '[PROTO POLLUTION] Prototype pollution sink found. If user input reaches Object.assign/$.extend/_merge, gadget chain may allow attribute pollution. Document vulnerable library version and payload.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'localStorage|sessionStorage|document\.cookie|indexedDB|CacheStorage|ServiceWorker.*cache') { Write-Host '[STORAGE] Client-side storage mechanism found. Check: (1) sensitive data stored client-side (tokens, PII), (2) XSS risk from stored data, (3) HttpOnly flag missing (allows JS access = theft if XSS).' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'postMessage|addEventListener.*message|onmessage|message.?event|BroadcastChannel|SharedWorker') { Write-Host '[XSS/BYPASS] postMessage/WebWorker communication found. postMessage origins often validator-weak. Test: (1) origin check missing, (2) data not sanitized, (3) structuredClone with prototype chain, (4) BroadcastChannel originating domain check.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'import\(|require\(|chunk|dynamic\.import|import\(\'|import\(") { Write-Host '[CODE SPLIT] Dynamic import/chunk loading detected. Map all lazy-loaded chunks. Chunk filenames may contain hashes/version info. Chunk endpoints = additional attack surface.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'webpack.*chunk|webpackJsonp|__webpack_require__|webpackChunk|webpack.*module') { Write-Host '[WEBPACK] Webpack module structure found. Module IDs may leak internal logic paths. Parse webpackChunk to extract all module source strings. Use source-map-explorer for visual analysis.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'redux|vuex|ngrx|pinia|store|getState|dispatch|commit|mutation|selector') { Write-Host '[STATE] State management framework found. Global state often contains: user profile, auth tokens, permissions, sensitive data. Document all keys in initial state. Check for sensitive keys (password, ssn, card) in state tree.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'environment|NODE_ENV|process\.env\.|import\.meta\.env|VITE_.*|NEXT_PUBLIC_|NUXT_PUBLIC_|REACT_APP_') { Write-Host '[ENV] Application environment variables found. Check: (1) production API keys exposed, (2) debug flags active, (3) internal URLs in public env vars, (4) NODE_ENV != production indicating dev build served.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'debug|verbose|trace|log\(|console\.log|logger|debugger|inspector|devtools') { Write-Host '[DEBUG] Debug/development mode found in JS. Document: (1) console.log statements with sensitive data, (2) debugger statements, (3) debug routes/functionality, (4) performance.now() timing leaks.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'workbox|precache|runtime.*caching|cacheFirst|networkFirst|staleWhileRevalidate') { Write-Host '[SW-CACHE] Service Worker caching strategy found. Identify cached content: API responses? User data? Images? Stale-while-revalidate can serve stale sensitive data.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'grecaptcha|recaptcha|hcaptcha|turnstile|cloudflare.*turnstile|captcha') { Write-Host '[CAPTCHA] reCAPTCHA/hCaptcha implementation found. Document: (1) site key (public), (2) whether auto-verification skips challenge, (3) where score-based (v3), (4) bypass potential via token reuse.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'dangerouslySetInnerHTML|v-html|innerHTML|outerHTML|insertAdjacentHTML|document\.write|render\.html|\.html\(|Markdown.*render') { Write-Host '[XSS JS] Client-side XSS sink found in JS. check: (1) is user input reachable, (2) is sanitization happening (DOMPurify?), (3) can sanitization be bypassed, (4) context: reflected vs stored vs DOM.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'function\s*\(|new Function|eval\(|setTimeout.*string|setInterval.*string|setImmediate.*string|execScript|msWriteProfilerMark') { Write-Host '[RCE JS] Code execution sink in JS. eval/Function constructor with user input = RCE in browser context. Check: (1) can user control code string, (2) is there a sanitization framework, (3) CSP blocks eval?' -ForegroundColor Red }

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Context for p1-warrior handoff: extracted endpoints MUST be verified live before adding to api_endpoints.txt. Deduplicate against existing api_endpoints.txt. Add {url, method, auth_required: bool, source: js-analysis}.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Context for chain-builder: leaked credentials or internal endpoint access patterns = prime chain-building material. Chain path: JS secret leak -> cloud access -> sensitive data. Chain path: internal endpoint in JS -> SSRF target if app makes outbound requests.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Spider/monkey coverage: if using Playwright/Puppeteer for dynamic extraction, run 5-10 min monkey browsing. Goal: trigger lazy-loaded bundles, authenticated routes, dynamic API calls not visible in static analysis. Log all new network requests from monkey run.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Big bundle handling (>3MB): split into chunks by (a) source map entry points, (b) webpack chunk boundaries, (c) eval boundaries. Process each chunk independently. Merge findings by URL dedup. Mark oversized bundles in findings/metadata.json.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] GitHub repo discovery: for each JS bundle found, try bundlephobia.com, shikimori.one, github search for source. Often framework example code or open-source component. Match version numbers to known CVEs in OSV/NVD.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Output sanitization rule: never store raw secrets. Replace with SHA-256 hash. Store raw separator in findings/confidential/encrypted_only/ if needed for report, but never include in report file itself.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Audit trail: js_analysis audit entries in audit.jsonl with {timestamp, bundle_url, bundle_hash, analysis_type, findings_count, tool_used, duration_ms}. All JS analysis logged.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Secret validation protocol: for each potential secret found: (1) validate pattern via regex, (2) test if alive/active API call, (3) determine scope of access, (4) document as potential vs confirmed, (5) redact before any output.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Endpoint testing pipeline: extracted endpoints -> handed to p1-warrior -> warrior runs authz tests -> validator confirms -> report written. JS-analysis does NOT test endpoints, only discovers. Testing is warrio territory.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Regex accuracy: static regex catches ~80% of secrets. False positive rate ~15%. Always manually verify each match. Do not auto-report regex matches without human review.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Framework-specific extraction patterns: React Native check for AsyncStorage, NetInfo. Electron check for ipcRenderer, remote module. Cordova/PhoneGap check for exec plugin. Each framework exposes different native APIs.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] CSP evaluation: document script-src, connect-src, form-action, frame-ancestors. Weak CSP = XSS risk. unsafe-inline = XSS risk. script-src * = XSS risk. report-uri present = monitored CSP. Note CSP for XSS hunting phase.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Cookie analysis categories: session tokens (immediate rotation risk), CSRF tokens (must be unpredictable), auth cookies (HttpOnly critical), analytics cookies (low risk), third-party cookies (cross-origin risk). Map all cookie types from JS found in analysis.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Hardcoded URL classification: (1) Production API URLs = identify for hunting, (2) Internal/private URLs = identify for SSRF testing, (3) Third-party service URLs = note for supply chain context, (4) CDN/static URLs = low priority. Classify each URL found.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Handlebar/template engine detection: if Handlebars/Mustache used, check for template injection. If Angular, check $sce.trustAsHtml usage. If React, check dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Each framework has different XSS risk profile.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Third-party SDK analysis: for each third-party library imported, check: (1) library name matches known vulnerable version, (2) CDN source, (3) SRI hash present, (4) Subresource Integrity checked, (5) CSP compatible. Notable: old jQuery, Lodash below 4.17.21.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Cross-origin resource sharing analysis: document allowedOrigins, allowedMethods, allowCredentials, exposedHeaders. Tested for: wildcard with credentials, null origin reflection, HTTP->HTTPS downgrade, subdomain trust, header reflection.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Trust boundary reminder: JS runs in user browser context. It can be fully controlled by user (DevTools, breakpoints). Do NOT rely on client-side JS for security decisions. JS analysis finds what COULD be leaked, not what IS leaked.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Integration with security-reviewer: pass all hardcoded secrets and internal URLs to security-reviewer. They indicate potential backdoor or debug path. Security-reviewer maps these to trust boundary violations.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Integration with p1-warrior: extracted API endpoints = hunting surface for p1-warrior. Each endpoint gets tested per bug class rotation. JS-analysis output format: url, method, auth_required, source_bundle.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Extraction rate limit: max 50 API calls per minute during browser automation. Use throttle. Do not spike target traffic during business hours without program approval.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Regex accuracy: static regex catches ~80% of secrets. False positive rate ~15%. Always manually verify each match. Do not auto-report regex matches without human review.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Source map scope: source maps expose original source code. If target is open-source or uses open-source components in production, this may be intentional. Only report source map findings as vulnerabilties if they expose production secrets.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Build reminder: after JS analysis, clean temporary files: rm -rf /tmp/js_bundles/*. Raw bundles should not persist past analysis. Keep only findings/ and evidence/ directories.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS STOP] Analysis complete. Verify: all bundles processed? secrets redacted? endpoints extracted? findings written to js_findings/? handed off to p1-warrior and validator?' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS STOP] Next: (1) Pass endpoints to p1-warrior (api_endpoints.txt), (2) Validate secrets via /validator, (3) Write report for confirmed sensitive leaks via /report-writer, (4) Share chain candidates with /chain-builder.' -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Async/pattern detection: detect Promise chains, async/await patterns, Observable sequences (RxJS). Async code often contains race conditions in token refresh, request cancellation, or state mutation. Track race-vulnerable patterns.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Error handler analysis: global error handlers (window.onerror, addEventListener unhandledrejection), try-catch blocks. Error handlers may leak sensitive info in error messages. Document error messages that include stack traces or environment details.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Third-party script trust chain: evaluate CSP for each loaded script, SRI hash verification, integrity attribute, crossorigin attribute, CORS policy for fonts/scripts/images. Unverified third-party = potential supply chain attack vector.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[JS-ANALYSIS] Minification/Obfuscation detection: compare bundle size vs source. High compression ratio (>80%) = likely minified. Detection of eval, atob, btoa, fromCharCode, _0x prefix = obfuscated. Obfuscated code requires deobfuscation phase before analysis.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

if ($lastCommand -match 'brotli|gzip|unzip|tar|gunzip|compress|decompress') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Compression/decompression tool detected. Many JS bundles served compressed. Decompress before analysis. Note: brotli may require brotli-cli or node zlib module.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'de4js|unpacker|js-beautify|prettier.*--parser|jsnice|snripper') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] JS obfuscation deobfuscation detected. Focus on deobfuscating top 3 largest bundles first. Complex obfuscation may require manual deobfuscation with breakpoints in DevTools.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastCommand -match 'cat.*package|type.*package|Get-Content.*package|package.*lock|yarn.lock|pnpm-lock') { Write-Host '[JS PRE] Dependency manifest read detected. Document all direct and transitive dependencies. Cross-reference each with Snyk advisory DB for known vulnerabilities. Lock file = reproducible dependencies.' -ForegroundColor DarkYellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'devtools|debugger|hot.*reload|hmr|vite.*hmr|webpack.*hmr|live.*reload') { Write-Host '[DEV] Dev tools / HMR endpoints detected in production bundle. HMR = WebSocket connection that may be exploitable. Check if HMR is disabled in production build. Debug endpoints may leak source maps.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'react-native|expo|capacitor|ionic|cordova|phonegap|flutter.*web') { Write-Host '[MOBILE-WEB] Mobile-web framework detected. React Native web = check for AsyncStorage leaks. Ionic/Cordova = check for plugin bridge exposure. Capacitor = check for plugin permissions. Native bridge attacks possible.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'angular.*universal|next.*ssr|nuxt.*ssr|remix|svelteKit.*ssr|astro') { Write-Host '[SSR] Server-side rendering framework detected. SSR frameworks have different XSS risk profile than client-only. Check: (1) hydration mismatch, (2) server-side template injection, (3) script passing from server to client, (4) sercurity headers in SSR.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'aria|role=|navigation|main|heading|alt=|title=|label|for=|tabindex|accesskey') { Write-Host '[A11Y] Accessibility attributes found. These can indicate UI structure and help map application features for hunting. Accessible labels = feature identification. Tab order = form fields for testing.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'IntersectionObserver|ResizeObserver|MutationObserver|PerformanceObserver|IntersectionObserverEntry') { Write-Host '[OBSERVER] Web API Observer pattern detected. Observers track DOM/resource changes. Potential for: (1) data exfil via observer callbacks, (2) DOM-based XSS if observer callback processes attacker-controlled values.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'WebGL|Canvas|WebGPU|OffscreenCanvas|ImageBitmap|createImageBitmap') { Write-Host '[CANVAS] WebGL/Canvas API found. Can be fingerprinting vector or data exfil via timing side channel. Canvas rendering may process untrusted images = image-based XSS or memory corruption (low risk but noted).' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'WebRTC|RTCPeerConnection|getUserMedia|MediaStream|RTCDataChannel') { Write-Host '[WEBRTC] WebRTC API found. May expose: (1) local IP addresses (internal network topology), (2) media device enumeration, (3) data channel bypasses CORS (peer-to-peer). Check if STUN/TURN servers exposed.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Clipboard|copyToClipboard|navigator\.clipboard|document\.execCommand.*copy|clipboardData') { Write-Host '[CLIPBOARD] Clipboard API found. Check: (1) sensitive data auto-copied (tokens, passwords), (2) clipboard poisoning vector, (3) async clipboard API requires permission (potential for permission phishing).' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Notification|showNotification|PushManager|pushManager|serviceWorker.*push|PushSubscription') { Write-Host '[PUSH] Web Push API found. Push subscription = potential tracking/notification vector. Check: (1) push payload encrypted, (2) VAPID keys rotated, (3) server can unsubscribe, (4) notification click leaks URL parameters.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'PaymentRequest|PaymentMethod|CreditCard|ApplePay|GooglePay|PaymentResponse|requestPayment') { Write-Host '[PAYMENT] Web Payment API found. Document: (1) payment methods accepted, (2) shipping/billing address collection, (3) payment handler, (4) transaction completion. Payment bugs = high bounty. Check for price manipulation, free item via JS modification.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Blob|FormData|FileReader|readAsText|readAsDataURL|slice|stream|ReadableStream|WritableStream') { Write-Host '[BINARY] Binary data handling found. Check: (1) MIME type validation on client, (2) file size limits enforced client-side only (bypassable), (3) Blob URL lifetime/scope, (4) CSV/XML parsing may lead to XXE or formula injection (CSV).' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Mutation testing reminder: for XSS findings, test with multiple browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge). CSP bypass varies by browser. DOM clobbering varies by browser. Document browser/version for report reproducibility.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Timing attack awareness: password comparison, JWT verification, auth checks in JS are timing-leaky. Document timing differences if found. JS timing APIs: performance.now(), Date.now(), console.time(). These can leak information via side channels.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Crypto misuse check: check for SHA-1/MD5 in JS, hardcoded crypto keys, weak random (Math.random() instead of crypto.getRandomValues()), ECB mode, static IV, missing authentication tag. Weak crypto in JS = client-side security theater.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Cryptocurrency/wallet detection: check for web3, window.ethereum, ethers, web3.js, MetaMask, WalletConnect, Solana web3.js. Wallet interaction = high-value target. Check: (1) transaction signing without confirmation, (2) network switching, (3) phishing via dApp approval.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

Write-Host '[JS CTX] Supply chain risk: for each external CDN script, check if SRI (Subresource Integrity) hash is present. Missing SRI = supply chain attack surface if CDN compromised. Document CDN dependencies for security-reviewer supply chain analysis.' -ForegroundColor DarkGray
